c.d: Number of active users or organizations utilizing the app.
Number and variety of third-party applications the app can integrate with.
Range and depth of functionalities offered by the app.
Number of platforms (e.g., Windows, macOS, iOS, Android) the app supports.

c.d: Level of security features implemented, such as end-to-end encryption.
Average user rating or satisfaction score.
Cost of the app, including free tiers and premium plans.
Ability of the app to accommodate teams of varying sizes.
User-friendliness and learning curve associated with the app.
Availability of customer support and educational materials.
